title: Define T-Deck direct BLE native app service
description: Define and implement the direct BLE native LICHEN app protocol surface for LilyGO T-Deck above the shared app-level contract. The T-Deck gateway config does not currently enable BLE NUS or a direct BLE native service; those remain blocked until the service UUIDs, characteristic semantics, framing, versioning, and app-model mapping are specified and covered by tests or golden vectors. Acceptance: direct BLE contract is documented, implementation Beads are filed or completed, and unsupported pieces are explicit.
